objects.name: Cisco security advisory (AV26-471)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-471 Date: May 14, 2026 On May 14, 2026, Cisco published security advisories to address critical vulnerabilities in the following products: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Release – versions 20.9 and prior Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Release – versions 20.10 and prior Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Release – versions 20.11 and prior Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Release – versions 20.12 and prior Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Release – versions 20.13 and prior Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Release – versions 20.14 and prior Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN...
